_publications._publicationTitle: Early differences in auditory processing relate to Autism Spectrum Disorder traits in infants with Neurofibromatosis Type I.

_contextSnippet: we did find that a greater Initial Response/Change to Standards at 10 months was related to both greater levels of activity on the IBQ-R [r(36) = .43, p = .01] as well as more ASD traits as measured on the AOSI [r(12) = .61, p = .04]
details: Greater Initial Response/Change to Standards at 10 months was related to more ASD traits as measured on the AOSI (r(12) = .61, p = .04)
